calendar.matters:
Petition For Court To Take Jurisdiction Of Trust For Limited Purpose Of Sale; And Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Jan-31-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dennis Soto appearing for petitioner. The trustee is unable to make disclosures regarding the real property. She wants the Court to take jurisdiction to confirm the sale. Court does not know if he has the authority to do it this way. Terms of sale stated by counsel. No one responded. Sale is confirmed at $1,000,000.00. N/B. Order signed.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
